# gaugeColors

**Instance Property**

The colors of the gauge.

## Declaration

```swift
var gaugeColors: [UIColor]? { get }
```

## Discussion

A gauge with more than one color appears as a gradient. The provider specifies the location of the colors using the [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKGaugeProvider/gaugeColorLocations] property. The [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKGaugeProvider/gaugeColors] and [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKGaugeProvider/gaugeColorLocations] properties must have the same number of elements.



## Setting the Gauge’s Appearance

- **gaugeColorLocations**: The location of each color in a multicolor gauge’s gradient.
- **style**: The style that defines the gauge’s appearance.
